title: テクノロジーと働き方②
question: How has technology changed the way we work? Has it been a good or bad development?
question_jp: テクノロジーと働き方について、否定的な側面を述べてください。
model_answer: Although there are a lot of pros and cons, mostly I'd say it has been a negative development.
The biggest drawback is the intrusion on our personal time.
For example, if we don't reply promptly to an email, our boss thinks we'll get in trouble.
This is completely unpaid overtime, which blurs the lines between work and private life.

items.meaning: 賛否両論・長所と短所
items.collocation: a lot of pros and cons

items.meaning: 浴びせる・攻めたてる
トラブルに巻き込まれる

drills.jp: 賛否両論あるが、概して悪い変化だと思う。
drills.model_en: Although there are pros and cons, I'd mostly say it's a negative development.

drills.jp: 最大の欠点は個人の時間への侵害だ。
drills.model_en: The biggest drawback is the intrusion on our personal time.

drills.jp: メールにすぐ返信しないと、トラブルになると上司は考える。
drills.model_en: If we don't reply promptly, the boss thinks we'll get in trouble.
